title: Protein Precipitation Extraction Method
author: Idha Arfianti
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.3xrgpm6

steps.title: The frozen plasma was thawed at...
steps.instruction: The frozen plasma was thawed at room temperature (25 ± 1°C).

steps.title: The thawed plasma was vortexed to...
steps.instruction: The thawed plasma was vortexed to ensure the sample was homogenous.

steps.title: To each 100 µL plasma sample,...
steps.instruction: To each 100 µL plasma sample, 50 µL of internal standard (IS) (containing 2 µg/mL of IS) was added, followed by the addition of 250 µL of acetonitrile (ACN).

steps.title: The mixture was vortexed, shaken for...
steps.instruction: The mixture was vortexed, shaken for 5 s, and centrifuged for 2 min at 14800 rpm.

steps.title: The supernatant was filtered with a 0
steps.instruction: The supernatant was filtered with a 0.2 µm syringe filter, then transferred to new a vial.

steps.title: Two microliters were then injected into the LC-MS/MS system
steps.instruction: Two microliters were then injected into the LC-MS/MS system.
